calls.title: Calls
calls.click_to_view: Click to view recordings and transcript

active_call.title: New Call
active_call.context_hint: Instructions for the AI when calling this number.
active_call.context_placeholder: e.g. You are a helpful sales assistant...
active_call.step1: 1. Enter phone number and press Start Call.
active_call.step2: 2. Allow microphone access in the browser.
active_call.step3: 3. Speak — the AI responds in real-time via WebRTC.
active_call.step4: 4. The session is saved after you hang up.

call_detail.title: Call Details
call_detail.no_recordings: No recordings available for this session.
